title: 12 Months Business Analyst ($4300 to $5400)  #NJN
description:
12 Months Contract

9AM to 6.30PM Monday to Thursday, and 9AM to 5.30PM Friday with 1 Hour meal break

Responsibilities

The role supports Anti Money Laundering screening execution and risk control, with a key focus on supporting the Business User Test Manager or Project Manager in end to end project delivery across Business Requirements and User Acceptance Testing processes. This covers pre project preparation, development and testing, implementation, and post implementation system issue escalation and resolution.

Preparation, Planning and Analysis Phase

  • Assist in UAT management including preparation and planning of UAT activities
  • Support Business Requirement preparation and Functional Specification review
  • Define test data and environment requirements, including coordination with relevant stakeholders
  • Initiate test case design activities including
  • Defining test scope, test cycles, test metrics, expected results, entry and exit criteria, and SLAs
  • Identifying and preparing test scenarios, conditions, and detailed test cases or scripts
  • Perform data validation and test data analysis using SQL to support test case design and scenario coverage

Execution of Testing Phase

  • Execute test cases and scripts, including data level validation using SQL queries
  • Analyse source to target data using SQL to verify AML screening logic, rules execution, and risk outcomes
  • Report, monitor, and document test progress, defects, and test results
  • Log, track, and validate incidents and defect fixes through retesting
  • Ensure entry and exit criteria are met at each test stage
  • Coordinate with IT, vendors, and relevant business units to ensure smooth testing and implementation
  • Monitor and track test case sign off and closure

Others

  • Assist in preparation, planning, and monitoring of key activities to ensure GC operational readiness for project implementation and post deployment support
  • Support post implementation data checks and issue investigation using SQL where required
    Requirements
  • Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science, Business Information Systems, or equivalent
  • Minimum 2-4 years of Testing Support or UAT experience, with strong hands on SQL experience
  • Proven ability to write and execute SQL queries for data validation, reconciliation, defect analysis, and test evidence support


Jessica Nguyen Huynh Thanh Truc

CEI Reg. No. R23113787

EA License No. 99C4599

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

postedCompany.description:
Established since 1996, Recruit Express has emerged as the leading staffing solutions provider that has set a proven track record for matching the right people to the right organization within the shortest time. With our vast network of resources, extensive databases and defined recruitment processes, we have been successfully bridging talented job seekers of the highest calibre to employers who only want the best in their teams.


In our relentless pursuit of excellent service, we have adopted best practices and dynamic growth strategies in expanding our operations across the Asia Pacific regions: We have offices in Singapore, Sydney, Hong Kong, Kuala Lumpur, Taipei, Shanghai, Beijing, Tokyo and Bangkok.

With 400 permanent committed consultants from various professional backgrounds and disciplines, we make a difference by delivering top-notch services to our clients and candidates alike.
